stemHtml: Which of the following correctly describes ILS Cat II?

options.a: A precision instrument approach and landing with a DH lower than 200 ft but not lower than 100 ft and a RVR not less than 300 m.
options.b: A precision instrument approach and landing with either a DH lower than 100 ft or with no DH and a RVR not less than 200 m.
options.c: A precision instrument approach and landing with a decision height not lower than 200 ft visibility not less than 800 m or a RVR not less than 550 m.
options.d: A runway intended for the operation of class II type aircraft.
